title: Futsal Phenom in Afghanistan Is a Hero the Taliban Didn’t Expect
author: Elian Peltier, Yaqoob Akbary and Tomás Munita
fullText: A triumph in indoor soccer has turned Alireza Ahmadi, 17, and other players from the Hazara minority, long marginalized in Afghanistan, into national heroes.
summary: A triumph in indoor soccer has turned Alireza Ahmadi, 17, and other players from the Hazara minority, long marginalized in Afghanistan, into national heroes.
